title: FluentCMS - Open Source ASP.NET Core & Blazor CMS
description: A modern, open-source Content Management System built on ASP.NET Core and Blazor. Designed to be fast, flexible, and user-friendly, it serves as both a traditional site-builder and a robust headless CMS.

content.overview: FluentCMS is an open-source CMS designed to provide developers and content writers with a highly flexible platform. Built natively on the innovative Blazor framework, it bridges the gap between traditional content management and decoupled headless architectures.
content.challenge: There has been a noticeable lack of suitable, modern .NET Blazor open-source CMS options in the market. Developers often faced restrictive legacy systems that hindered the seamless integration of modern frontend tools, AI-assisted workflows, and personalized user experiences.
content.solution: FluentCMS was developed to fill this gap. Leveraging a headless architecture powered by ASP.NET Core, it separates the front and back ends. It features dynamic site-building via Blazor components, AI-powered writing assistance, Flowbite styling, and extensible plugins. It also supports flexible database options like LiteDB and MongoDB.
content.results: FluentCMS is steadily growing an active open-source community on GitHub. It empowers development teams to build scalable applications while providing content creators with a sleek, intuitive dashboard for efficient content lifecycle management.

seo_title: FluentCMS Case Study | Open Source .NET Blazor Headless CMS
seo_description: Discover FluentCMS, a modern open-source headless CMS built with ASP.NET Core and Blazor. Learn how it integrates AI and flexible architectures for developers.
seo_keywords: headless CMS, open source CMS, .NET CMS, Blazor CMS, ASP.NET Core, FluentCMS, AI content generation
